query:
SELECT c.id as courseId, c.title as courseTitle, m.id as moduleId, m.titleAr, COUNT(q.id) as questionCount
FROM courses c
JOIN modules m ON m.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.moduleId = m.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title, m.id, m.titleAr
ORDER BY c.id, m.orderIndex;
